$about.purpose: Shared catalog of predefined Delivery Type values across the Context Plane ecosystem. Delivery Types describe how/where data is delivered — last-mile BI tools (Looker, Tableau), warehouses (BigQuery, Snowflake), object stores (S3), streaming platforms (Kafka), etc.
consumers: apps/data-contract — Contract tab Delivery / Infrastructure section
packages/shared/src/languages/bitol — maps catalog keys to ODCS server type enum
packages/shared/src/languages/openmetadata — maps catalog keys to OMS equivalents (future)
$about.philosophy: Predefined values on a core AgileData object type (global_delivery_type). NO per-type field schemas — we start simple. Extra attributes can be added over time via explicit design, never driven by external standards.
$about.how_to_add: New entry keyed by a short slug (kebab-case, no spaces). Include {label, category, description}. Categories group items in UI pickers: bi | warehouse | relational | object_store | streaming | protocol | other.

looker.label: Looker
looker.description: Google's enterprise BI and data modeling platform.

superset.label: Apache Superset
superset.description: Open-source data exploration and visualization platform.

hex.label: Hex
hex.description: Collaborative data notebook and app platform.

sigma.label: Sigma
sigma.description: Cloud analytics platform with a spreadsheet-like UI.

s3.label: Amazon S3
s3.description: AWS object storage for data files.

azure.label: Azure Blob / ADLS
azure.description: Azure Blob Storage or Data Lake Storage.

api.label: HTTP API
api.description: HTTP / REST API endpoint delivering data.

custom.label: Custom
custom.description: A delivery type not yet in the catalog — free-form entry.
